channel.title: Javascript on Himalaya's Dev Journal
channel.description: Recent content in Javascript on Himalaya's Dev Journal

item.title: PixelQuest — A Retro Platformer
item.description: A canvas-based platformer built from scratch with JavaScript. Features procedural level generation and pixel art assets.

item.title: My Journey into Procedural Generation
item.description: How Perlin noise, cellular automata, and L-systems helped me create interesting-looking worlds for my game.
